description: Voice Waveform State Control - Animate waveform only when sound detected, static when idle, hidden when done

userStories.title: Make waveform static by default (CSS only)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the waveform to be static (not animating) by default when the voice panel opens.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify styles.css: remove animation from .vv-wave-bar by default
Add new CSS class .vv-waveform.animating .vv-wave-bar with the wave animation
Keep static bar heights (24px, 48px, 72px, 96px, 120px, 96px, 72px, 48px, 24px)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill: confirm waveform bars are static when panel opens

userStories.title: Start animation when sound detected
userStories.description: As a user, when I start speaking, the waveform should animate to show my voice is being detected.
acceptanceCriteria: In voice.js, handle vv_status message with state='speaking'
Add 'animating' class to .vv-waveform element when 'speaking' status received
Waveform should animate with the existing wave keyframe animation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill: confirm animation class is added when speaking

userStories.title: Send 'listening' status on VAD silence transition
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the backend to send 'listening' status when silence is detected after speech.
acceptanceCriteria: In app.py _consume_vad(), handle VADStateChange with VoiceState.SILENCE
Send vv_status with state='listening' when silence detected after speech
Only send 'listening' if speech was previously detected (speech_detected=True)
Typecheck passes
Verify by checking app.py logic for silence state handling

userStories.title: Stop animation on silence (listening status)
userStories.description: As a user, when I pause speaking, the waveform should stop animating but remain visible.
acceptanceCriteria: In voice.js, handle vv_status message with state='listening'
Remove 'animating' class from .vv-waveform when 'listening' status received
Ensure waveform remains visible (display should not be changed)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill: confirm animation stops on silence

userStories.title: Hide waveform on transcription done
userStories.description: As a user, when transcription completes, the waveform should disappear leaving only the transcript text.
acceptanceCriteria: In voice.js, handle vv_status message with state='done' or 'timeout'
Set .vv-waveform display to 'none' when 'done' or 'timeout' received
Transcript text in #transcript-box should remain visible
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill: confirm waveform is hidden after transcription

userStories.title: Reset waveform state on panel reopen
userStories.description: As a user, when I reopen the voice panel after a previous transcription, the waveform should be visible and static.
acceptanceCriteria: In voice.js openVoicePanel(), reset waveform state before opening
Remove 'animating' class from .vv-waveform
Set .vv-waveform display to '' (empty, visible)
Clear transcript text
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill: confirm waveform is visible and static on panel open
